# Swamy Reality Developers — Full Reference

> Swamy Reality Developers is a family-run real estate company headquartered in Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh, India. For over 15 years the company has designed, approved and delivered residential plots, apartments, gated communities and custom-built homes across Kakinada and the surrounding East Godavari region. Every project is regulator-approved (RERA, KAUDA, DTCP) with clear titles.

## Quick Facts

- Legal name: Swamy Reality Developers
- Business type: Real estate developer (residential)
- Headquarters: Kakinada, East Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh, India
- Founded: 15+ years of continuous operation
- Website: https://swamyrealitydevelopers.com
- Contact phone: +91 99897 78222
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919989778222
- Primary market: Kakinada and greater East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh
- Specialities: gated communities, residential plots, boutique apartments, custom construction
- Approvals held on active projects: RERA (Andhra Pradesh), KAUDA (Kakinada Urban Development Authority), DTCP (Directorate of Town & Country Planning)

## About the Company

Swamy Reality Developers is a real estate company in Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh. The company began as a small family practice and has grown into a multi-project developer while remaining owner-operated. Every project is walked by a family member before it opens to buyers, and the same team handles design, approvals, construction and handover — there is no white-labelled third party.

The company works exclusively in Kakinada and the surrounding corridor because it knows the streets, the soil rhythms and the local approval process intimately. This local focus is deliberate: it lets the team maintain clear-titled land, honest documentation and long-term relationships with buyers who often return for a second or third purchase.

## Services Offered

Swamy Reality Developers, a real estate company in Kakinada, offers the following services:

1. Residential plots — open plots and premium plots in DTCP and KAUDA approved layouts, with paved internal roads, underground utilities and clear titles ready for registration.
2. Apartments — boutique 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartment developments, RERA approved, with reserved parking, backup power, lifts and community amenities.
3. Gated communities — planned gated layouts with 24/7 security, CCTV, controlled entry, landscaped parks, wide internal roads and underground drainage.
4. Custom construction — architecture, exterior design, landscape design and site planning for buyers who want to build on their own plot.

## Approvals and Credentials

- RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority, Andhra Pradesh): every active development is RERA registered. RERA IDs are published on the project pages.
- KAUDA (Kakinada Urban Development Authority): every layout in Kakinada city limits is KAUDA approved.
- DTCP (Directorate of Town & Country Planning): all plotted developments are DTCP approved with layout drawings on file.
- Clear titles: no litigation, no encumbrance, straight documentation.

## Projects — Detailed

### Mahatma Enclave
- Type: Gated Community
- Location: Sashikanth Nagar, Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005678
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA, DTCP
- Description: A fully planned gated community with wide 40ft and 30ft internal roads, underground drainage, tree-lined pocket parks and a single manned entrance. Designed for families who value privacy and safety.

### Sri Sri Residency
- Type: Apartments (2 BHK and 3 BHK)
- Location: Ramanayapeta, Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005712
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA
- Description: A boutique RERA-approved apartment tower where every unit is a corner or edge unit for cross-ventilation. Includes rooftop deck, community lounge, reserved covered parking, lift and backup power.

### Swamy Satya Venkata Gardens
- Type: Premium Plots
- Location: Cheediga, Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005744
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA, DTCP
- Description: A curated open-plot layout in the rapidly appreciating Cheediga corridor. Plot sizes 200–500 sq. yards, fully DTCP approved, with utilities laid to the plot boundary and paved internal roads.

### Krishna Nagar
- Type: Gated Community
- Location: Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005791
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA, DTCP
- Description: A compact gated community of 48 plots arranged around a central park. Every plot has direct park access. Single controlled entrance, 24/7 security and CCTV.

### Lalitha Vihar
- Type: Residential Plots
- Location: Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005802
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA, DTCP
- Description: A DTCP approved residential plot layout on a well-connected corridor with schools, hospitals and daily needs within two kilometres. Plot sizes 150–300 sq. yards.

### Venkata Vihar
- Type: Premium Plots
- Location: Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh
- RERA ID: P02400005817
- Approvals: RERA, KAUDA, DTCP
- Description: A premium open-plot layout bordered by open agricultural land — no back-to-back plots. Plot sizes 250–600 sq. yards with paved roads and underground utilities. Easy NH-16 access.
